title: lavandula spica var. vulgaris
intro: Lavandula spica var. vulgaris, commonly known as true lavender or English lavender, is a subspecies of the lavender plant that belongs to the mint family. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Lavandula spica var. vulgaris include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Lavandula spica var. vulgaris can be used in various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
